extra.message: User input from the 'username' parameter is concatenated directly into a Jinja2 template string before being parsed and rendered. This allows Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), leading to Remote Code Execution (RCE).

cwe: CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine
CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
